text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Takarazuka Kinen has finally
arrived!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
The real race is between the Otherworldly
Front-Runner, Silence Suzuka, and the Empress,
Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka was incredible in the Kinko Sho! I wonder
if she'll be able to take first today too.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
But Air Groove's a genius on the track. There's no
beating her! Have you seen her final dash in the
homestretch before?

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
You're so right! Man, I can't wait for this race to
start!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Between Silence Suzuka's display in the Kinko Sho
and Air Groove's overwhelming skill, the
excitement for this race from the crowd is
palpable.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well... there isn't much left to say.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll see you on the track!
